creator: arved@FreeBSD.org
text:
There is a problem with the plist:

===>  Building package for phpsysinfo-3.0.7
tar: www/phpsysinfo/gfx/sort_asc.gif: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: www/phpsysinfo/gfx/sort_both.gif: Cannot stat: No such file or 
directory
tar: www/phpsysinfo/gfx/sort_desc.gif: Cannot stat: No such file or 
directory
tar: Error exit delayed from previous errors.
pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256

Please investigate!
